name: Walmart
overview: Walmart Global Tech builds the technology that powers the world's largest retailer. Focus on e-commerce, supply chain, and customer experience.
hiringProcess: Walmart's process includes an online assessment, 2-3 technical rounds, a managerial discussion, and HR round.
eligibility: Good CS fundamentals, full-stack development experience preferred.
preparationTips: Practice medium-level DSA, focus on system design for e-commerce scenarios. Understand microservices architecture.
